creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Could you please elaborate on what it is you are trying to accomplish?  Your patch, as-is, forces SRC_CONf and MAKE_CONF to /dev/null, which invalidates the purpose of being able to set SRC_CONF=/my/local/src.conf, etc., which I do not agree with.

I also do not understand the purpose of forcefully setting TARGET_CPUTYPE, as that should be determined based on the values of TARGET, TARGET_ARCH, and KERNCONF of the build.  If this is not the case, you are trying to solve the wrong problem, IMHO.
